title: Add Standard Footer with Privacy Policy Link
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a standard footer on all pages with a privacy policy link and copyright notice, so that I can access legal information and the application looks professional and compliant.
description:
Add a standard footer to all application pages containing:

- A **Privacy Policy** link in the lower left pointing to `https://datatoolspro.com/privacy/`
- A **copyright notice**: Copyright 2023, GoodmanGroup LLC DBA Data Tools Pro

This footer ensures legal compliance and provides a consistent branded experience across all pages.
acceptance_criteria: A footer appears on all application pages
Footer contains a Privacy Policy link pointing to https://datatoolspro.com/privacy/
Footer displays the copyright notice: Copyright 2023, GoodmanGroup LLC DBA Data Tools Pro
Footer is consistently styled across all pages
ux_changes: Standard footer added to all pages with Privacy Policy link and copyright notice.
implementation_notes: Simple footer component added globally to all page templates.
